title: Implement executor fan-out and fleet summary command
description: Build the thread-pooled fan-out helper and the fleet summary flow that queries selected projects in parallel and renders aggregated summary output in table and JSON forms.
acceptance_criteria: `executor.fan_out` runs per-project callables with bounded concurrency and captures per-project exceptions without aborting the fleet operation.
`takt-fleet summary` resolves target projects from registry filters and shells out through `TaktAdapter.summary()` in parallel.
Summary output renders count columns and degraded-health rows as specified, with JSON output support.
Missing or unhealthy projects do not abort the overall summary command when at least one project is queried.
